name: Inspector 2 Industrial Pro Portable Carbon Monoxide Detector
tagline: Industrial-grade CO detection you can trust
personalNote: Needed something I could trust while we were having basement construction.

name: Lavazza Super Crema Whole Bean Coffee
tagline: Medium espresso roast, Arabica and Robusta blend, 2.2 lb bag
personalNote: These beans produce the perfect frothy crema when making flat whites with my espresso machine. Smooth, not too bitter.

name: Uni Kuru Toga Metal Mechanical Pencil
tagline: All-metal body with auto lead rotation, 0.5mm fine point
personalNote: I was tired of flimsy mechanical pencils and wanted something that felt substantial. This one lives on my desk.

name: Raspberry Pi Zero 2 WH
tagline: Quad-core mini computer with pre-soldered header, Wi-Fi, and Bluetooth
personalNote: I use this for my animated wizard card project inside a Chocolate Frog Tin. Tiny, powerful enough for what I need.

name: TP-Link TL-SG105 5-Port Gigabit Switch
tagline: Plug-and-play unmanaged network switch, fanless metal design
personalNote: Gave me a wired connection for every device in my office. Plug it in and forget about it.

name: J-B Weld SuperWeld Superglue
tagline: Professional-grade super glue, 20g 2-pack
personalNote: My go-to super glue for fixing all the kids' broken toys. Strong hold, dries fast.

name: PiSugar 3 Portable Power Board
tagline: Battery power management for Raspberry Pi Zero W/WH
personalNote: The easiest way to battery-power my Raspberry Pi projects. I use it for the animated wizard card and other portable builds.

name: SUNLU AMS Heater for Bambu Lab
tagline: In-place filament dryer for Bambu Lab AMS, heats to 70°C
personalNote: Dries my filament while it sits in the AMS on top of my printer. No more pulling spools out to dry separately.

name: FMS 1/18 Land Cruiser LC80 RC Crawler
tagline: Toyota-licensed 1/18 scale 4WD rock crawler, ready to run
personalNote: Got this for my son Chase's ninth birthday. It's been a blast driving around the dirt and construction in our basement.

name: Statik MagStack Pro USB-C Cable
tagline: Magnetic USB-C charging cable, 100W fast charging, 3ft
personalNote: The magnetic tips keep the cord together when I'm traveling. No more fumbling with wire wraps or tangled cables in my bag.

name: Philips Hue White and Color Ambiance A19 LED Bulb (2-Pack)
tagline: Smart color-changing 60W equivalent bulb, works with Alexa/Google/HomeKit
personalNote: I use these lights to mimic the circadian rhythm throughout my house. Crazy, but I like it.

name: Pukoko Magnetic Phone Tripod Mount Adapter
tagline: MagSafe-compatible cold shoe phone holder for cameras and tripods
personalNote: An easy way for me to connect my iPhone to a tripod.

name: Fitbit Google Ace LTE Kids Smartwatch
tagline: Kids smartwatch with calling, messaging, GPS, and activity games
personalNote: Gave this to my 9 year old to give him some independence. He loves it.

name: De'Longhi Rivelia Automatic Espresso Machine
tagline: Fully automatic with built-in grinder, milk frother, and bean switch system
personalNote: Now that I like coffee, this is one of my favorite things. It makes frothy drinks like flat whites and cappuccinos with the milk addon. So easy to use. I can't recommend this enough.

name: Jack Rudy Cocktail Demerara Syrup
tagline: Premium amber demerara sugar syrup, 8 oz
personalNote: This is the premade version of what I use in my espresso martinis.

name: India Tree Demerara Sugar
tagline: Unrefined fair trade cane sugar from Mauritius, 1.75 lb
personalNote: I make a 2 parts sugar to 1 part water solution to use in my espresso martinis.

name: xTool F1 Dual Laser Engraver
tagline: Portable dual-laser engraver with 10,000mm/s speed
personalNote: This has been fun to learn how to use in my DIY projects.

name: Craighill Wine Key
tagline: Premium stainless steel sommelier corkscrew
personalNote: It's fancy, but it's my favorite wine opener.

name: NEBULA Capsule 3 Laser Portable Projector
tagline: Mini smart projector with Google TV, Netflix, Dolby Digital, 120" screen
personalNote: This projector is so easy to bring on road trips or set up in the kids' bedroom when friends are over.

name: Murska Brass Blade Ice Scraper
tagline: European brass-blade car windshield ice scraper
personalNote: I don't need to scrape ice off the car windshield often, so it's nice to have something small that can just sit in the car door until I need it.

name: Youngstown General Utility Plus Work Gloves
tagline: Heavy-duty washable mechanic gloves
personalNote: My go to work gloves.

name: Fanttik X8 APEX Portable Tire Inflator
tagline: Cordless 150PSI air compressor with LCD screen
personalNote: I keep one of these in each car in case of a deflated car or bike tire or one of the kids' balls.

name: STM MagPod MagSafe Tripod
tagline: MagSafe-compatible mini tripod and phone stand with retractable legs
personalNote: Small enough to throw in a bag for family trips when we want to take group photos.

name: Degrees of Comfort Heated Mattress Pad
tagline: Zone heating electric bed warmer with auto shut-off
personalNote: I use this so I don't have to get into a cold bed at night in the winter. I set it on a smart plug with a timer connected to Home Assistant.

name: Twinkly 400 RGB+W Smart LED String Lights
tagline: App-controlled 105ft smart string lights with WiFi and music sync
personalNote: This is what makes my huge front hedge animated for the holidays. It's a lot of lights on the house, but it's a crowd pleaser.

name: Escargots de Bourgogne Premium Wild Burgundy Snails
tagline: Imported premium wild Burgundy escargot, 2 dozen very large
personalNote: Crazy enough this is where I get my snails for escargot.

name: Dremel 8250 12V Cordless Rotary Tool Kit
tagline: Brushless cordless rotary tool with 5 accessories, battery, and charger
personalNote: Everyone needs a Dremel!

name: KEY-BAK Original SD Retractable Keychain
tagline: Heavy-duty retractable keychain with 36-inch Kevlar cord and belt clip
personalNote: This is how I like to carry my badge for work.

name: Windeck Finger Surfboard
tagline: Miniature finger surfboard toy for riding the wind
personalNote: These are genius. You wear them on your finger and ride the wind outside of a moving car window.

name: Nioxin System 2 Cleanser Shampoo
tagline: Thickening shampoo for natural hair with progressed thinning
personalNote: My go to shampoo that tries to keep the hair I have as I get older.

name: KLASK Magnetic Board Game
tagline: Magnetic wooden tabletop game for 2 players
personalNote: Love this game. It's like magnetic wooden air hockey.

name: Ember Temperature Control Smart Mug
tagline: App-controlled heated coffee mug, keeps your drink at the perfect temperature
personalNote: We have given this to everyone we know. Does a great job of keeping that coffee warm to the end.

name: Anker Nano Power Bank with Built-in USB-C
tagline: Compact 5,000mAh portable charger with foldable USB-C connector
personalNote: This is what I use to recharge my devices when I travel.

name: Goodr OG Polarized Sunglasses
tagline: Lightweight no-slip polarized sunglasses
personalNote: My go to cheap sunglasses. Can't have enough of them.
